basics.name: JOSEPH DEMAREST
basics.label: Multidisciplinary Engineer (Software and Electrical)
basics.summary: I'm a multidisciplinary engineer with expertise in both software and hardware, passionate about designing and implementing innovative solutions. Experienced in PCB design, software development, and full-stack project implementation.

highlights: Engineered custom PCB solutions using KiCad, ensuring optimized layout and high-quality integration with other hardware components.
Programmed a comprehensive, low-cost beam profiler application, integrating custom-designed PCBs with the Raspberry Pi platform and various camera sensors.
Cashier (Aug. 2017 - Aug. 2019): Managed cash register operations, addressed customer inquiries, and ensured a seamless checkout experience.
Assistant Manager (Aug. 2019 - Aug. 2021): Oversaw daily store operations, including staff scheduling, inventory management, and financial reporting.
Supervised and trained new hires on store procedures, POS system usage, and customer service standards.

projects.name: Wifi Cameras
projects.description: Engineered cost-effective wifi cameras using Arduinos and OV7670 camera modules, providing performance on par with commercial alternatives at a significantly reduced cost.
highlights: Developed a robust web interface utilizing JavaScript and NodeJS for live video feed accessibility.
Designed and 3D printed a customizable case mountable on almost any surface.

projects.name: Home Lab
projects.description: Established a sophisticated home lab with four physical servers running Linux-based hypervisors for learning, experimentation, and self-hosting cloud services.
highlights: Gained hands-on experience in managing Linux servers and containerizing applications using Docker and Kubernetes.

projects.name: Custom Keyboard PCB
projects.description: Crafted a custom keyboard PCB, showcasing end-to-end hardware and software development skills.
highlights: Designed the PCB and firmware, and 3D printed a custom case.
Optimized QMK firmware to enhance functionality and user experience.
Published the project on GitHub for open-source collaboration.

projects.name: Plant Monitoring
projects.description: Developed a plant monitoring and watering system using Arduinos and C++, eliminating the need for manual oversight.
highlights: Captured data on plant hydration and light levels.
Displayed information on a dashboard developed with JavaScript and React.
